summary: Completed frontend testing of Proof of Intelligence flow (Sprint 14.1). Successfully tested riddles intro, play phases, claim flow, and admin panel. Found critical wallet linking backend error preventing complete flow.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns HTTP 400 error when attempting to link valid Solana wallet address
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks completion of Proof of Intelligence flow - users cannot reach final complete phase

integration_issues.issue: Wallet submission fails with HTTP 400, preventing transition to complete phase

passed_tests: Terminal popup opening in SEALED phase
Proof of Intelligence CTA visibility and functionality
Riddles intro phase with progress indicator (0/5)
Riddles play phase with first riddle 'Le Grand Architecte'
Answer input and submission (both wrong and correct answers)
Incorrect answer banner with attempts counter
Correct answer banner with matched keyword display
Claim phase transition and email input
Wallet phase transition and input field
Admin riddles management - all 5 riddles configured
Terminal typing animation and phase transitions
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical wallet linking API error: /api/infiltration/clearance/link-wallet returns HTTP 400 for valid Solana addresses. This blocks the complete Proof of Intelligence flow. Also investigate why 2FA is required for admin CSV export.

success_percentage.frontend: 75% - Most UI flows work but wallet linking integration fails
success_percentage.backend: 60% - Riddles API works but wallet linking endpoint has critical error
